title: stelis antioquiensis
intro: Stelis antioquiensis, also known as the Colombian orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Colombia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis antioquiensis include its ability to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
